---
title: ""
---

# Website Analytics

This page provides insights into the performance and audience engagement of my portfolio website.

## About This Website

This portfolio was built using:

- Quarto
- RStudio
- GitHub
- GitHub Pages

## Analytics Dashboard

Google Analytics is connected to this website to monitor:

- Website visitors
- Page views
- Traffic sources
- Device usage
- Visitor locations
- Engagement over time

As traffic grows, this page will be updated with screenshots and summaries of visitor trends.

## Future Goals

- Increase portfolio traffic through SEO
- Track the most visited projects
- Monitor engagement from recruiters and employers
- Improve user experience based on visitor behavior
